templateInputs.audience: people considering a new or redesigned website
templateInputs.goal: validate whether AI-generated website directions plus verified human feedback is a compelling service
templateInputs.successSignal: Voters would consider trying it and can name why it would help.

question.title: Would this AI website feedback service be compelling enough to try?
question.description: Review the public mockup. Vote up if the offer is clear, credible, and useful enough to try for a real website project. Vote down if it feels unclear, generic, or unnecessary. In feedback, mention your biggest hesitation.
